functions.risk: Legacy v1 quiz RPC is SECURITY DEFINER and writes quiz sessions / XP; direct PostgREST callers must remain owner-scoped and not inherit default PUBLIC execute.
functions.grantPosture: PUBLIC execute revoked after the latest RCA function definition; authenticated and service_role are the only explicit execute roles.

functions.risk: Canonical quiz submit RPC is SECURITY DEFINER and writes quiz state, responses, history, XP, and adaptive learner state; execute privileges need explicit role scoping.
functions.grantPosture: PUBLIC execute revoked after the latest RCA function definition; authenticated and service_role are the only explicit execute roles.

functions.risk: RAG retrieval RPC is SECURITY DEFINER over NCERT content chunks; execute posture must avoid broad PUBLIC access and remain explicit.
functions.grantPosture: PUBLIC execute revoked after the latest RCA function definition; authenticated and service_role are the only explicit execute roles.
